title: thalictrum simplex subsp. altaicum
intro: Thalictrum simplex subsp. altaicum, also known as meadow rue, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic effects. The plant's extracts and preparations are believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Meadow rue can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a range of ailments and promote overall well-being.
